prestazioni: M100 6.3L V8 (M100.980) engine rebuild with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a custom Schneider Racing camshaft (280° duration, 0.500" lift) for improved high-RPM breathing while retaining low-end torque for the 2.7-ton limousine

Custom twin-turbocharger setup using Garrett GTX5533R turbos (86mm compressor wheels) with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates, custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust manifolds by Supersprint, and a PWR triple-core intercooler with 1,200 CFM cooling capacity to support 1.2 bar of boost (stock M100 is naturally aspirated)

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Mercedes-Benz W100-specific Quaife ATB differential (80% lock) in the rear, custom 3.92:1 ring & pinion gears by Precision Gear, and a Tilton Engineering twin-disc ceramic clutch with a billet flywheel to handle the 600+ lb-ft of torque
estetica: Custom 1960s-inspired widebody conversion by RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) using hand-beaten aluminum over steel flares, extending the rear fenders by 4" and the front by 3" to accommodate 20x12" BBS RS-GT wheels (ET -12) with 285/30R20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires

Full custom interior by Saddleback Leather: hand-stitched black and tan Nappa leather with diamond-quilted door panels, a bespoke rear lounge with a fold-out mahogany cocktail cabinet (housing a crystal decanter set), and a digital instrument cluster retrofit using a Motec C127 dash with vintage-style analog gauges

Exterior lighting overhaul: Hella 1960s-style LED headlights with bi-xenon projectors, custom rear taillight assemblies using Osram LED strips (replicating the original W100 design but with modern brightness), and a hidden front splitter with integrated DRLs by Vorsteiner
